Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class Dashboard

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Dashboard
public class Dashboard extends Metadata

Java class for Dashboard complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Dashboard">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="backgroundEndColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="backgroundFadeDirection" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartBackgroundDirection"/>
         <element name="backgroundStartColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="chartTheme" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartTheme" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="colorPalette" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartColorPalettes" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardChartTheme" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartTheme" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardColorPalette" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartColorPalettes" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardFilters" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardGridLayout" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardGridLayout" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardResultRefreshedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardResultRunningUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="folderName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isGridLayout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="leftSection" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentSection" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="middleSection" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentSection" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="numSubscriptions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rightSection" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentSection" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="runningUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="textColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="titleColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="titleSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getDashboardFilters

      public List<DashboardFilter> getDashboardFilters()
      Gets the value of the dashboardFilters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the dashboardFilters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDashboardFilters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DashboardFilter

      Returns:
      The value of the dashboardFilters property.
